programs.title: The Toys That Built The World
programs.desc: The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles high-kick their way into the action figure market in the late 1980s, opening the door for a new kind of martial arts toy. But their place at the top is soon challenged.

programs.title: The Food That Built The World
programs.desc: Two entrepreneurs rise from the ashes of Prohibition by staking everything on two liquors and go on to save an industry, change cocktail culture, and create two of the most popular brands in the country.

programs.title: The Food That Built Asia
programs.desc: The sushi episode delves into the story of one of Japan's most popular dishes. The episode examines the history of sushi, from its humble beginning as a method of preserving fish.

programs.title: The Food That Built Asia
programs.desc: The episode examines the history of tempura from Nagasaki tempura, the prototype of today's tempura derived from fritters brought to Japan by 16th-century Portuguese/Spanish traders and missionaries.

programs.title: The Unbelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programs.desc: We've heard the tales of prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes. From a man who frees himself all thanks to a fruit to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programs.title: The Pickers
programs.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.
